company_name: The Interpublic Group of Companies, Inc.

dependencies: Third-party service providers including cloud computing services
Third-party vendors for production and media costs on behalf of clients
Technology and emerging media companies for marketing tools
risks: Cybersecurity incidents or data breaches affecting third-party service providers
System failures or network disruptions in third-party cloud computing services
Reliance on third-party vendors for client production and media commitments

regulatory_risks: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in European Economic Area and United Kingdom
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA) and California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)
Comprehensive privacy laws in several U.S. states
Data protection and privacy laws affecting digital marketing and data transfers between countries
Export controls and economic sanctions (U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act, U.K. Bribery Act)
Restrictions on operations in Russia and increasingly China due to sanctions
Content-related rules for specific products (pharmaceuticals, alcoholic beverages, tobacco, food)
Restrictions on media scheduling, placement, and advertising directed to children
Anti-corruption laws including FCPA and U.K. Anti-Bribery Act (2010)
Laws and regulations on user privacy, use of personal information, and online tracking technologies
Potential bans on advertising of specific products (alcohol, tobacco, marijuana)
Taxes on or denial of deductions for advertising
OECD Pillar 2 global tax reform (minimum 15% tax)
Climate change and ESG-related laws and regulations
Inflation Reduction Act of 2022 (book minimum tax and excise tax on share repurchases)

sanction_risks: Export controls and economic sanctions limiting operations in Russia
Increasing restrictions on operations in China
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance risks
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions
Limitations on ability to operate in certain geographic regions or service certain clients
